title: Enchanting Infuser x Sortilege (Compatiblity)
description: Improves how Enchanting Infuser interacts with Sortilege's enchantment cap feature.
body:
Improves how [Enchanting Infuser](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/enchanting-infuser-forge) and [Sortilege](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/sortilege) mods interact with one another.

Without the mod, there is no limit to how many enchantments you can select in the Infuser, wasting some if Sortilege's enchantment cap feature is enabled.

With it present, enchanting is impossible if the amount of selected enchantments is greater than the amount of enchantments an item can accept.

Nauturally, requires both Sortilege and Enchanting Infuser.

# Forge requires [Sinytra Connector](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/sinytra-connector)!!!
